login.subtitle: Sign in to manage the server

dashboard.stopConfirmMessage: This disconnects any players currently online.
dashboard.restartConfirmMessage: This briefly disconnects any players currently online.
dashboard.waitingForMetrics: Waiting for the first metrics sample...

players.title: Players Online
players.banExtraMessage: This also removes them from the server.

broadcast.title: Broadcast
broadcast.placeholder: Message to send to all players...

rcon.noCommandsYet: No commands sent yet. Try "list" or "help".

sftp.emptyFolderHint: Drag files here to upload, or use the buttons above.
sftp.deleteFolderMessage: This deletes the folder and everything inside it. This cannot be undone.
sftp.tooLargeToEdit: "{{name}}" is too large to edit ({{size}}). Download it instead.
sftp.notTextFile: "{{name}}" doesn't look like a text file. Download it instead.

plugins.modsNotice: Only plugins are supported — mods aren't available yet.
plugins.noPluginsHint: Install one above, or browse the Store tab.
plugins.deleteMessage: This removes the .jar from the server. This cannot be undone.
plugins.restartBannerMessage: Plugin changes take effect after a restart.
plugins.restartTriggered: Restart triggered - see Dashboard for live output

backups.title: Backups
backups.noBackupsHint: Click "Run Backup Now" to create one.
backups.backupTriggered: Backup triggered - see Dashboard for live output

scheduler.title: Scheduled Tasks
scheduler.noTasksHint: Create one to automate restarts or RCON commands.

taskForm.cronHint: Standard 5-field cron (minute hour day month weekday), evaluated in the backend's local timezone.

serverProperties.title: server.properties
serverProperties.noOtherProperties: No other properties in this file.

serverConfig.restartRequiredMessage: Changes to bukkit.yml / spigot.yml require a full server restart to take effect.
serverConfig.restartTriggered: Restart triggered - see Dashboard for live output
serverConfig.otherKeysNotice: Keys not listed here are left untouched in the file - edit them in Raw mode if needed.

settings__allow-end.label: Allow The End
settings__allow-end.description: Whether players can travel to the End dimension.

settings__warn-on-overload.label: Warn on overload
settings__warn-on-overload.description: Log a warning when the server can't keep up with the tick rate.

settings__permissions-file.label: Permissions file
settings__permissions-file.description: Filename of the permissions file Bukkit loads on startup.

settings__update-folder.label: Update folder
settings__update-folder.description: Folder plugin updates are staged in until the next restart.

settings__plugin-profiling.label: Plugin profiling
settings__plugin-profiling.description: Track per-plugin CPU time for the /timings report.

settings__connection-throttle.label: Connection throttle
settings__connection-throttle.description: Minimum time (ms) between connection attempts from the same IP.

settings__query-plugins.label: Query plugins
settings__query-plugins.description: Include the plugin list in the server's GameSpy4 query response.

settings__deprecated-verbose.label: Deprecated event warnings
settings__deprecated-verbose.description: How verbosely to log usage of deprecated Bukkit API events.

settings__shutdown-message.label: Shutdown message
settings__shutdown-message.description: Message sent to players when the server shuts down.

settings__minimum-api.label: Minimum API version
settings__minimum-api.description: Oldest Bukkit API version plugins are allowed to target.

spawn-limits__animals.label: Animal spawn limit
spawn-limits__animals.description: Max passive land animals per world.

spawn-limits__water-ambient.label: Water ambient spawn limit
spawn-limits__water-ambient.description: Max ambient water mobs (e.g. cod, salmon) per world.

spawn-limits__water-underground-creature.label: Water underground creature spawn limit
spawn-limits__water-underground-creature.description: Max glow squid and similar underground water mobs per world.

spawn-limits__ambient.label: Ambient spawn limit
spawn-limits__ambient.description: Max ambient mobs like bats per world.

chunk-gc__period-in-ticks.label: Chunk garbage collection period
chunk-gc__period-in-ticks.description: How often (in ticks) unused chunks are checked for unloading.

ticks-per__animal-spawns.label: Animal spawn interval
ticks-per__animal-spawns.description: Ticks between animal spawn attempts (higher = less frequent).

ticks-per__water-spawns.label: Water mob spawn interval
ticks-per__water-spawns.description: Ticks between water mob spawn attempts.

ticks-per__water-ambient-spawns.label: Water ambient spawn interval
ticks-per__water-ambient-spawns.description: Ticks between ambient water mob spawn attempts.

ticks-per__water-underground-creature-sp.label: Water underground creature spawn interval
ticks-per__water-underground-creature-sp.description: Ticks between underground water mob spawn attempts.

ticks-per__ambient-spawns.label: Ambient spawn interval
ticks-per__ambient-spawns.description: Ticks between ambient mob spawn attempts.

settings__bungeecord.label: BungeeCord support
settings__bungeecord.description: Enable IP forwarding for running behind a BungeeCord/Velocity proxy.

settings__restart-on-crash.label: Restart on crash
settings__restart-on-crash.description: Automatically run the restart script if the server crashes.

settings__restart-script.label: Restart script
settings__restart-script.description: Path to the script run when restarting after a crash.

settings__player-shuffle.label: Player shuffle
settings__player-shuffle.description: Interval (ticks) for shuffling the player list order; 0 disables it.

settings__user-cache-size.label: User cache size
settings__user-cache-size.description: Number of player name/UUID lookups kept in usercache.json.

settings__sample-count.label: TPS sample count
settings__sample-count.description: How many samples are averaged for the reported TPS.

messages__whitelist.label: Whitelist message
messages__whitelist.description: Shown to a player rejected for not being whitelisted.

messages__unknown-command.label: Unknown command message
messages__unknown-command.description: Shown when a player enters a command that doesn't exist.

messages__server-full.label: Server full message
messages__server-full.description: Shown when a player tries to join a full server.

messages__outdated-client.label: Outdated client message
messages__outdated-client.description: Shown when a player's client version is too old. {0} is replaced with the required version.

messages__outdated-server.label: Outdated server message
messages__outdated-server.description: Shown when a player's client is newer than the server. {0} is replaced with the server's version.

messages__restart.label: Restart message
messages__restart.description: Shown to players when the server restarts.

world-settings__default__view-distance.label: View distance
world-settings__default__view-distance.description: Chunks sent to each client around their position; -1 or "default" uses server.properties' value.

world-settings__default__simulation-dist.label: Simulation distance
world-settings__default__simulation-dist.description: Chunks around each player that are actively ticked; -1 or "default" uses server.properties' value.

world-settings__default__mob-spawn-range.label: Mob spawn range
world-settings__default__mob-spawn-range.description: Radius in chunks around a player where mobs can spawn.

world-settings__default__chunks-per-tick.label: Chunks per tick
world-settings__default__chunks-per-tick.description: How many chunks are processed for random ticks each tick.

world-settings__default__item-despawn-ra.label: Item despawn rate
world-settings__default__item-despawn-ra.description: Ticks before a dropped item despawns.

world-settings__default__arrow-despawn-r.label: Arrow despawn rate
world-settings__default__arrow-despawn-r.description: Ticks before a stuck arrow despawns.

world-settings__default__nerf-spawner-mo.label: Nerf spawner mobs
world-settings__default__nerf-spawner-mo.description: Disable AI on mobs spawned from spawners.

world-settings__default__merge-radius__e.label: XP orb merge radius
world-settings__default__merge-radius__e.description: Distance (blocks) within which experience orbs merge together.

world-settings__default__merge-radius__i.label: Item merge radius
world-settings__default__merge-radius__i.description: Distance (blocks) within which dropped items merge together.

world-settings__default__entity-activati.label: Animal activation range
world-settings__default__entity-activati.description: Distance (blocks) from a player at which animals stay active.

world-settings__default__entity-activati.label: Monster activation range
world-settings__default__entity-activati.description: Distance (blocks) from a player at which monsters stay active.

world-settings__default__entity-activati.label: Raider activation range
world-settings__default__entity-activati.description: Distance (blocks) from a player at which raid mobs stay active.

world-settings__default__entity-activati.label: Misc entity activation range
world-settings__default__entity-activati.description: Distance (blocks) from a player at which miscellaneous entities stay active.

world-settings__default__entity-activati.label: Water entity activation range
world-settings__default__entity-activati.description: Distance (blocks) from a player at which water mobs stay active.

world-settings__default__entity-activati.label: Villager activation range
world-settings__default__entity-activati.description: Distance (blocks) from a player at which villagers stay active.

world-settings__default__entity-tracking.label: Player tracking range
world-settings__default__entity-tracking.description: Distance (blocks) at which players are tracked/visible to each other.

world-settings__default__entity-tracking.label: Animal tracking range
world-settings__default__entity-tracking.description: Distance (blocks) at which animals are tracked.

world-settings__default__entity-tracking.label: Monster tracking range
world-settings__default__entity-tracking.description: Distance (blocks) at which monsters are tracked.

world-settings__default__entity-tracking.label: Misc tracking range
world-settings__default__entity-tracking.description: Distance (blocks) at which miscellaneous entities are tracked.

world-settings__default__entity-tracking.label: Other tracking range
world-settings__default__entity-tracking.description: Distance (blocks) at which other entity types are tracked.

whitelist.title: Whitelist
whitelist.reloadTooltip: Use this if you edited whitelist.json directly; not needed when adding/removing via this panel.
whitelist.failedToAdd: Failed to add player to whitelist
whitelist.failedToRemove: Failed to remove player from whitelist

ops.title: Operators
ops.levelChangeRestartMessage: Operator level changes require a full server restart to take effect. Adding/removing operators applies instantly.

motd.title: MOTD (BetterMOTD)
motd.reloadTooltip: Runs "bettermotd reload" over RCON to apply the config live, without restarting the server
motd.reloadFailedToast: Config saved, but the reload failed: {{error}}
motd.otherKeysNotice: Any other keys already in config.yml are preserved untouched - use Raw mode to edit them.
motd.miniMessageHint: MOTD text uses MiniMessage formatting, e.g.

colorFormat.label: Color format
colorFormat.description: Text format used to parse MOTD/hover text: AUTO detects the format automatically; pick a specific one (MINI_MESSAGE, LEGACY_AMPERSAND, HEX_AMPERSAND, JSON...) if your text contains literal < or > characters.

activeProfile.label: Active profile
activeProfile.description: Which profile is shown by default. Can also be changed live with /bettermotd profile <id>.

placeholders.label: Enable placeholders
placeholders.description: Turns on %online%, %max%, %version%, %profile%, %preset%, %motd_frame% and %time% in MOTD/hover text.

placeholderAPI.label: Enable PlaceholderAPI
placeholderAPI.description: Also expands PlaceholderAPI placeholders in MOTD/hover text. Requires the PlaceholderAPI plugin to be installed.

maintenanceEnabled.label: Maintenance mode enabled
maintenanceEnabled.description: While on, the server list shows the maintenance profile below and can kick joining players who lack the bypass permission.

maintenanceProfile.label: Maintenance profile
maintenanceProfile.description: Profile shown in the server list while maintenance mode is enabled.

bypassPermission.label: Bypass permission
bypassPermission.description: Players with this permission see the normal MOTD and can still join during maintenance.

debugSelfTest.label: Self-test
debugSelfTest.description: Runs BetterMOTD's internal self-test on startup. Leave off in production.

debugVerbose.label: Verbose logging
debugVerbose.description: Logs extra diagnostic detail. Leave off unless you're troubleshooting a config issue.

selectionMode.label: Selection mode
selectionMode.description: RANDOM picks a new preset every ping. STICKY_PER_IP picks randomly, then keeps the same preset for a given IP. HASHED_PER_IP is a stable pick based on IP. ROTATE moves to the next preset every ping.

fakePlayers.label: Fake players
fakePlayers.description: Adds fake players to the shown count. static is a fixed number, random picks within a range each ping, percent adds a percentage of the real count.

justXMore.label: Show "online + X more"
justXMore.description: Shows the real online count plus a fixed extra number, instead of the true max players.

maxPlayers.label: Fixed max players
maxPlayers.description: Overrides the max-player count shown in the server list with a fixed value.
